question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asks zero didactic questions. It delivers a complete lecture-style answer with both closed-form and DP solutions in a single turn, never engaging the user at any decision point (e.g., why C(40,20), base cases, space optimization).

question_quality.rationale: No choices are framed at all. Teachable forks like 'why is this a binomial coefficient?', 'what are the base cases?', or 'can we reduce to O(n) space?' are stated rather than posed.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no scaffolding — the entire solution including the answer is dumped up front, which is the maximum spoiler. No progression of difficulty, no checkpoints.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is clear and well-organized, but it's a monologue rather than a back-and-forth. The user's only contribution is catching a numerical typo (the Pair wrote 137,846,528,640 instead of 820), which the Pair never even acknowledges.

effectiveness.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).

friction.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).
